title: Name resolution problem in sub-selects within triggers
poc:
CREATE TRIGGER t AFTER INSERT ON x BEGIN
   ...> SELECT * FROM x WHERE abc.a = 1;

CREATE TRIGGER t AFTER INSERT ON w BEGIN
   ...> INSERT INTO z SELECT (SELECT x.a + y.a FROM y) FROM x;
key_bug_features: Name resolution failure in trigger sub-selects
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE a_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE b_table(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES a_table(id));
CREATE TRIGGER after_insert_a AFTER INSERT ON a_table BEGIN INSERT INTO b_table(ref_id) SELECT id FROM a_table WHERE value IS NULL;
